name: prompt closed-loop step perf-to-cross-loop emits a SPACE collector signal for the prompt-skill metric
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/skills space && printf 'x:
  latency_p50_ms: 100
' > .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml && printf 'dimensions: {efficiency_and_flow: {enabled: true}}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step perf-to-cross-loop --stats .claude-tdd-pro/skills/perf-stats.yaml --space-config space/config.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'cross_loop_emit=space:efficiency' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
